blended.narrative: Bretton Woods is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
